articles.author: Gregory Svirnovskiy
articles.title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz is the world’s problem: ‘Go get your own oil!’ - Politico
articles.description: NATO partners, including the European Union, have largely refused to help secure the strait.
articles.content:
Oil prices have surged since the start of the war; the average price for gasoline in the U.S. crossed the $4-a-gallon mark Tuesday, the highest level since 2022.
